channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump warns assault on infrastructure ‘hasn’t even started’
item.description: Trump steps up threats after US strike on Iran's largest bridge, as Tehran launches attacks across the region.

item.title: How war on Iran turned Pakistan’s LNG surplus into a looming shortage
item.description: Pakistan braces for gas shortage crisis as LNG supplies collapse amid escalating regional conflict.

item.title: Iran vows retaliation after deadly US strike on bridge in Karaj
item.description: Iranian officials say the country’s largest bridge will be “built back stronger,” but America’s standing won't recover.

item.title: 9-year-old boy recounts airstrike in Lebanon that killed whole family
item.description: Karim Al-Haj Hussein survived an Israeli strike on his home in Lebanon’s Baalbek that killed his family members.

item.title: Oil shock triggers global price spikes as Iran war drags on
item.description: Fuel shocks from the US-Israel war on Iran are rippling worldwide, as Strait of Hormuz disruptions push prices higher.

item.title: Iran says army forces are ready to repel US-Israeli attacks
item.description: Iran says it is ready to counter any US-Israeli attacks, insisting its military capabilities remain intact.

item.title: At least 43 people killed in ADF attack in northeast DR Congo, army says
item.description: Attacks by the Allied Democratic Forces have intensified in recent months.

item.title: As war drags on, US reiterates Trump open to diplomacy with Iran
item.description: US State Department accuses Iran of attacking civilian sites as Trump shares footage of destruction of Iranian bridge.

item.title: State Department claims Iran ‘continually’ pursuing nuclear weapon
item.description: A State Department spokesman claimed the US launched its war on Iran because Tehran was pursuing a nuclear weapon.

item.title: What might end Israel’s war on Iran?
item.description: Attacks by Israel and the United States continue relentlessly while Iran hits back.
